rationale: Ruby 2.7/3.0 keyword argument compatibility audit for FLE code; language compatibility, not spec behavior.
Using processId as fake service id in LB mode; implementation optimization, no specific spec rule cited.
LB spec monitoring section explicitly requires SDAM events in LB topology; driver was not emitting them.
Improvement adding LB spec validation for non-mongos servers; empty description, thin signal.
Improvement implementing LB validation on missing service id; proactive spec adoption, not wrong existing behavior.
Scoping connection generation to service in LB mode; proactive LB spec adoption work, Improvement type.
QueryCache returns wrong results after partial cursor iteration; Rails integration layer bug, not a MongoDB spec area.
Allow awaited hello EOF during client shutdown; implementation robustness, no specific spec rule contradicted.
Prohibiting load_balanced + replica_set combination; Improvement with Related link only, empty description.
Increasing minimum Ruby version to 2.4; build/platform support, no spec involvement.
OP_MSG spec says SHOULD use OP_MSG for handshake when API version declared; driver used OP_QUERY instead.
GridFS spec MUST check if indexes already exist before creating them; driver checked files collection, not indexes.
Serverless CI test failures; Issue split from DRIVERS-1851 coordination ticket.
Racy RSpec method invocation expectations in threads; test suite implementation bug, not spec behavior.
Changing ObjectId#as_json to return plain String instead of extended JSON; user convenience, not spec conformance.
Push monitor thread exits on address resolution SocketError; implementation robustness, no specific spec rule violated.
Rate limiting push monitor handshake sends; description says 'I think they should', uncertain spec requirement.
Making as_json user-friendly for numeric types; user convenience change, extended_json provides canonical output.
Issue split DRIVERS-1618 + Improvement: don't check dropped/info fields in dropDatabase response; spec rollout.
Issue split DRIVERS-1875 + Improvement: adding BSON binary subtype 7; proactive spec rollout work.
Issue split DRIVERS-776 + Improvement: support 'let' option for aggregate command; proactive spec rollout.
Increasing minimum Ruby version to 2.5; build/platform support, no spec involvement.
Issue split DRIVERS-1969 + Improvement: read preference for $out/$merge on pre-5.0 servers; spec rollout.
Issue split DRIVERS-1840 + Improvement: removing legacy OP_KILL_CURSORS/OP_INSERT/OP_UPDATE/OP_DELETE.
Issue split DRIVERS-812 + Improvement: Azure and GCP keystores in FLE; proactive spec rollout.
CRUD spec MUST track iterated documents and enforce limit; driver not adjusting batch size to respect limit.
CI red due to parse error in crud_spec test; build/test infrastructure failure, not driver spec behavior.
Issue split DRIVERS-1393 + Improvement: authorizedCollections option for listCollections; spec rollout.
Session not propagated from View to Aggregation in count_documents, breaking transaction visibility per sessions spec.
Extended JSON spec permits additional fields in DBRef; driver drops them during deserialization/serialization round-trip.
DBRef not a subclass of Hash; type hierarchy implementation issue, no spec rule about Ruby class inheritance.
Driver creates DBRef with nil $id when $id absent and injects $id on output; DBRef spec requires $id to be present.
DBRef spec tests left out of BSON ruby test suite; adding missing spec tests back is test infrastructure work.
DBRef spec requires $ref/$id/$db fields appear first; driver doesn't enforce this field ordering during serialization.
Issue split DRIVERS-1916 + Improvement: handshake must use OP_MSG with API version; spec rollout work.
Internal refactoring to move DBRef class from driver to bson-ruby; no spec behavior change.
Issue split DRIVERS-1560 + Improvement: test that KMS TLS connections verify peer certificates; spec rollout.
Splitting Decimal128 InvalidRange exception into two types for clarity; API ergonomics, no spec rule involved.
Fix BigDecimal serialization in Hash; Ruby-specific convenience feature, BSON spec doesn't define BigDecimal handling.
Implementing BigDecimal#to_bson; Ruby-specific convenience feature, not a BSON spec requirement.
Documentation of BigDecimal/Decimal128 differences; documentation ticket, no code behavior change.
Changing Decimal128 default deserialization to BigDecimal; Ruby-specific API behavior, not spec-defined.
Implementing BigDecimal round-tripping via Decimal128; Ruby-specific convenience feature, not BSON spec requirement.
Testing driver against bson master and 4-stable branches; CI/build configuration, no spec behavior.
Testing OCSP verifier against Ruby 3.0 with new toolchain; CI/platform testing, no spec behavior change.
Backwards-compatible DBRef constructor for API compatibility with 2.17; internal compatibility fix, not spec.
Bumping bson dependency to 4.14.1; dependency management, no spec behavior change.
Issue split DRIVERS-742 + Improvement: comment field support for all helpers; proactive spec rollout.
Adding JRuby 9.3 support; platform compatibility, no spec behavior involved.
Feature request to skip SDAM auto-detection when server bound to localhost; use-case workaround, not a spec violation.
